title: Simple Killbind
description: For whatever reason, someone spontaneously dying can be quite amusing. This mod brings that functionality to Minecraft.
body:
For whatever reason, someone spontaneously dying can be quite amusing. This mod brings that functionality to Minecraft.

Demo GIF:

![Short GIF of a player dying twice.](https://i.imgur.com/GEWUgNb.gif)

Default Keybind is **SHIFT + K**
